title: Offline Sample 1
body: Sample post 1 for offline testing. This verifies Notepad grounding and typing flow without API access.

title: Offline Sample 2
body: Sample post 2. You can change this content to match interview scenarios or stress test multiline text.

title: Offline Sample 3
body: Sample post 3. Set-of-Mark detection should still re-locate the icon for each iteration.

body: Sample post 4. This mode helps when network policy blocks external endpoints.

title: Offline Sample 5
body: Sample post 5. Keep desktop visible so icon OCR can read the Notepad label.

title: Offline Sample 6
body: Sample post 6. Use dry-run first to avoid accidental clicks during debugging.

title: Offline Sample 7
body: Sample post 7. If icon is renamed like Notepad (2), fuzzy matching should still work.

title: Offline Sample 8
body: Sample post 8. Local-search-first optimization makes repeated runs faster.

title: Offline Sample 9
body: Sample post 9. If OCR is noisy, retry logic attempts icon detection up to three times.

title: Offline Sample 10
body: Sample post 10. Final offline post for validating the complete save and close loop.
